name: Yaeka Sakuragi
description: The sole daughter of the Sakuragi family boss. A timid girl who struggles at expressing her emotions.

name: Last Order
description: Misaka clone No. 20001, she is the administrator of the Misaka Network and the fail-safe mechanism in case the Sisters got out of control. She is not designed to function independently and survive for long outside a culture container, and appears to be only about ten years old. Unlike her previous clone sisters, she is capable of showing emotions and has a close relationship with Mikoto, Misaka Imouto and Accelerator.

name: Mario Minakami
description: Minakami Mario is one of the seven main protagonists in RAINBOW. Nicknamed Mario has been detained to two years of confinement in the Shonan Special Disciplinary School. He was found guilty of inflicting grave injuries on one of his teachers who attempted an act of violence towards a female student. Mario is strong willed and hates being looked down upon. He was the first one to start a fight in day one soon after being confined in a cell with Sakuragi.

name: Shouyou Yoshida
description: Mentor to the Old Jouishishi members in their youth. Trained Sakata Gintoki, Katsura Kotarou and Takasugi Shinsuke in swordskills and the bushido. He died before the Gintama storyline started.

name: Hol Horse
description: **Height**: 188cm *(anime)* Hol Horse is a minor antagonist in JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Stardust Crusaders (first seen in Chapter 141 and Episode 10), as well as one of the main characters of Crazy Diamond's Demonic Heartbreak. He is a tall, blonde-haired cowboy-themed mercenary, serving under Dio and his army of other Stand Users. name: Ariane Glenys Maple
nativeName: アリアン・グレニス・メープル
description: A dark elf female warrior with lilac skin, long white hair, and golden eyes. Excellent in magic and swordsmanship. She encountered Arc when he assisted her in trying to rescue kidnapped elves. Ever since they have been working together. Elven names don't follow the same custom as human names do. First, you have an elf their first name, followed by the name of their parent with the same sex's name and as last the name of the place they belong too.

description: He is an extremely powerful Esper who was formerly a part of the Super 5 of Claw. He now works at the agency alongside Reigen and Mob.

name: Kirie Motoba
description: Umaru's classmate. Because of her reserved personality and eyes that always look like they're staring, she's often left out in class. She's actually just shy.

name: Myuu
description: A young girl from the Sea-Dweller Tribe who got kidnapped to be sold as a slave, but was saved by Hajime Nagumo and Shea Haulia while they came across her in Fuhren. Initially,​ she had been calling Hajime as "Onii-chan", but later changed to call him "Papa".

name: Ji-Woo Seo
description: He is a very bright and kind person who will go out of his way to help the people around him. His main ability is super speed. In the past, Ji-U had no friends because he was afraid that people would discover his powers and those they discovered would treat him like a freak. The first friend he made was a stray cat, which led to his adoration for cats today. His mentor is Kayden Break, who started to live with him. He is friends with Ji-Seok Yu, U-In, and Su-Bin Lee.

name: Mei Shijima
description: Shijima Mei is a former student at Kamome Academy and the current School Mystery Number 4.
